audience: Self-employed professionals and SMEs in Belgium considering a new website, one-page site or online shop
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een Belgische KMO helpen om een realistisch websitebudget te bepalen en offertes inhoudelijk te vergelijken

searchIntent.question: How much does a professional website cost in Belgium, what determines the price and how can I compare quotations fairly?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgian SMEs comparing local website suppliers and prices excluding or including Belgian VAT

longTailKeywords: how much does a website cost in Belgium
directAnswer: A website in Belgium can cost from a few hundred euros for a tightly defined template one-pager to €20,000 or more for extensive custom work. Five public Belgian examples checked on 10 July 2026 ranged from €345 excluding VAT to €20,000 or more, but this is a selected snapshot rather than a market average or VisualVibe price list. Compare strategy, content, design, functionality, ownership and recurring costs, not just the final figure.
title: How much does a website cost in Belgium? A practical pricing guide
metaDescription: How much does a website cost in Belgium? Review indicative prices, annual costs, key price factors and a checklist for comparing quotations fairly.
h1: How much does a website cost in Belgium?

internalLinks.anchor: complete guide to building a website in Limburg
one-page site and a full website

factsToPreserve: The five selected public Belgian examples were checked on 10 July 2026 and are not a representative market study, official average or VisualVibe prices
The observed range ran from €345 excluding VAT for a tightly defined template one-pager to €20,000 or more for extensive custom work
The indicative categories overlap because included services differ substantially
DNS Belgium's stated registrar wholesale price is €5.50 excluding VAT and is not necessarily the customer's final price
Belgium's standard VAT rate is 21%; €5,000 excluding VAT therefore equals €6,050 including VAT
Google's stated Core Web Vitals targets are LCP within 2.5 seconds, INP below 200 milliseconds and CLS below 0.1, but do not guarantee ranking
The article does not provide a quotation, official average, legal advice or tax advice
